creator: frank+ports@ilse.behrens.de
text:
I did not test the changes, but I do not have any objections.
I approve the patch with one additional change (my email address):
--- Makefile    2011-05-28 16:44:21.101705000 +0200
+++ Makefile.new        2012-07-17 19:36:14.724662464 +0200
@@ -14 +14 @@
-MAINTAINER=            frank+ports@ilse.behrens.de
+MAINTAINER=            frank@harz2014.behrens.de

Regards,
Frank Behrens
port maintainer for dns/zkt
